# PODProfit

> The vendor-neutral, multi-currency, share-able profit calculator for Print-on-Demand sellers.

PODProfit helps Etsy, Shopify, Printful, and Printify sellers calculate their **real** net profit before they list a product — accounting for vendor costs, shipping, marketplace fees, payment processing, and currency conversion.

## What makes PODProfit different

- **Vendor-neutral**: Compare Printful and Printify side-by-side. Most calculators are locked to one.
- **Multi-currency**: USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, JPY built in. Most calculators are USD-only.
- **Share-able**: Every calculation gets a unique URL with a dynamic preview image — perfect for r/PrintOnDemand discussions.
- **Transparent**: Every price has a source URL and an "as of" date. We tell you when data is stale.

## Core facts

- Site: https://getpodprofit.com
- Free tier: full calculator, share-able URLs, no signup required
- Pro plan: $9/month or $79/year (planned, launching with public release)
- Lifetime access: $149 (limited to first 100 customers, planned launch 2026-06-09)
- Soft launch: 2026-06-09 on r/PrintOnDemand
- Public launch: 2026-06-16 on Product Hunt
- Built solo by Satsuki Okazaki (@lastarna on X, u/o_satsuki on Reddit)
- Built fully in public — source on https://github.com/SATSUKI/podprofit

## Supported products (W1 catalog, expanding)

- Bella+Canvas 3001 unisex t-shirt
- Gildan 18000 heavy blend sweatshirt
- 11oz ceramic mug
- All-Over-Print unisex hoodie
- Cotton tote bag (16x16)
- Matte poster (18x24)

For each product, the calculator covers Printful and Printify with shipping costs to US, EU, UK, Canada, and Australia.

## Marketplaces supported

- Etsy (with optional offsite ads 12% modeling)
- Shopify
- Amazon Merch on Demand
- Printify Pop-Up Store
- Manual / direct sales
